name: typography-h2
visual_summary: The typography-h2 component is a high-level, large font size and line height header typically used in headings and titles to draw user attention. It's ideal for page titles, articles, or section headers. Use it for emphasizing key content on the page.
generation_prompt:

Description: The typography-h2 component is a high-level, large font size and line height header typically used in headings and titles to draw user attention. It's ideal for page titles, articles, or section headers. Use it for emphasizing key content on the page.
